name: Table
visual_summary: A table component for displaying tabular data. It is a versatile component that can be used to display data in a structured format, making it easy to compare and analyze.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready table component with the following characteristics:

Name: Table
Description: A table component for displaying tabular data. It is a versatile component that can be used to display data in a structured format, making it easy to compare and analyze.
Style: light, responsive
Interactions: static
Tags: table, data display, comparison

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
